name: Stickman parkour craft
description: Stickman will have to go through parkour skyblock, and overcome all obstacles on his way! Each level complicates this task, but can you? Collect gold along the way and buy various skins!
instructions: Use the W A D or virtual buttons to run and the space bar or the button on the right to jump Get to the flag to complete the level
tags: 1 Player, 2D, Adventure, Craft, Minecraft, Platform, Stickman
